untranslatable_reason: This signal requires option-specific indicators (implied volatility surface, IV spreads across strikes, relative mispricing detection, theta analysis) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal operates on volatility surface topology and relative option pricing, not on price/volume/technical indicators. Standard equity technical indicators cannot replicate volatility surface edge detection or inter-strike relative mispricing logic.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_191_0 is a volatility surface arbitrage strategy requiring: (1) implied volatility by strike, (2) IV spread calculations between neighboring strikes, (3) historical spread distribution statistics, (4) theta decay measurement, (5) relative pricing divergence metrics. None of these can be constructed from the allowed price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, stochastic, Donchian, pivot, volume ratio, or bar property indicators. This strategy is designed for options traders using volatility surface tools, not equity price action systems.
